{{Quote|As gatemaster, defense of the hypergate is my first function.|Gatemaster [[Beltek'k]]|<ref name="TfB" />}}
'''Gatemaster''' was a position of honor given to certain members of [[Gree (species)/Legends|Gree]] society. They were responsible for the care and operation of the Gree's system of [[hypergate]]s. Gatemaster [[Beltek'k]] was responsible for the [[Asation]] hypergate by the time of the [[Lotek'k|Terror From Beyond]] [[Raid on Asation|incident]].<ref name="TfB" />
